results.title: Could the EU force Instagram and Facebook to end 'addictive designs'?
results.description: Instagram and Facebook pose excessive addiction risks for children and young people, the European Commission has found in preliminary results of an EU investigation, as it pushes forward proceedings against parent company Meta.
